issues.description: Condition 'HasRestingDon' with count:1 is incorrect. The card text says 'DON!! −1', meaning you pay 1 DON!! to activate the effect. This should be a cost, not a condition. The condition should be 'Always' since there are no conditional requirements listed in the card text.
Target should specify 'maxCount:1' to indicate 'up to 1' character, not just the cost restriction. Current syntax only specifies maxCost but should clarify the quantity limit.
